title: kohautia aspera
intro: Kohautia aspera, also known as rough kohautia, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of kohautia aspera include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
